title: Bloom Energy Corp (BE) Q1 2026 Earnings Summary
text: Bloom Energy reported Q1 2026 financial results with significant growth across all metrics. Revenue reached $751.1 million, reflecting 130.4% year-over-year growth. Product revenue hit an all-time quarterly high of $653.3 million. Gross margin expanded to 31.5%, up 280 basis points annually. Operating income surged to $129.7 million from $13.2 million prior year. Non-GAAP EPS improved to $0.44 versus $0.03 year-ago. The company raised 2026 revenue outlook to $3.4-$3.8 billion, representing 80% YoY growth at midpoint. Gross margin is expected to reach approximately 34%. Non-GAAP operating income guidance is $600-$750 million. Non-GAAP EPS guidance is $1.85-$2.25. The company secured a major partnership with Oracle for Project Jupiter, demonstrating strong momentum in the AI power sector. Management emphasized that Bloom Energy focuses on creating value rather than comparing prices with competitors, highlighting their differentiated approach in the market.
